name: Kitty House Escapist
description: In Kitty House Escapist, you play as a mischievous cat determined to break free. Explore detailed houses, dodge humans, and use agility to overcome obstacles. Each level brings new puzzles, hidden paths, and challenges. Stay quiet, stay quick, and escape every home in this fun and clever feline adventure. Web Dev https://www.coolcrazygames.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
